summary: Iteration 3 PASS. Verified Vercel build fix + all Sprint-3 additions. Backend: 13/13 pytest passed (restaurants=10 incl. 5 Brazilian: churrascaria-brasa/boteco-rio/pastel-cia/acai-sol/feijoada-mineira; tickets=4 with Rede Expressos R6LJC56 + R6LJC5N + hotel STD17-1276 + Benagil BEN-SG-2603 all with quickchart.io qr_url; emergency=9 with 112 danger + hospital lat/lng; trip-stats phase/budget/checklist/shopping; itinerary Day1 15:15 Rede Expressos + Day4 13:10 R6LJC5N; briefings/weather/shopping OK; smart-go & bus/next correctly return 422 without required query params). Expo web export build: 'cd /app/frontend && rm -rf dist && EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://portimao-family-backend.onrender.com npx expo export --platform web --output-dir dist' completed successfully — produced dist/index.html (1.29 kB) + dist/_expo/static/js/web/entry-<hash>.js (2.7 MB) + favicon.ico + metadata.json + assets/. Verified backend URL 'portimao-family-backend.onrender.com' is baked into the bundle. Frontend on Emergent preview: home shows 'Portimão Verão 26' title with weather pill (18-24°C, UV 5), countdown, briefings, 3-card stats dashboard, quick actions grid including Bilhetes & Emergências. /restaurants: 'Brasileiro' filter chip works and reveals Brasa Churrascaria, Boteco do Rio, Pastel & Cia, Açaí do Sol, Sabor Mineiro with real images, ratings, distance chips, promos, menus. /tickets: 4 cards render with operator badges & 'Mostrar QR' — modal opens showing QR image, reservation ID, code R6LJC56. /emergencia: big red '112' card with 'GRATUITO • 24H • UE', Saúde section (SNS 24, Hospital, Farmácia), Segurança section (PSP, GNR, Hotel). /gallery: 3-way picker Foto/Vídeo/Câmara visible + empty state (no existing photos so Save/Share thumb buttons could not be visually verified but no functional regression detected). Same deprecation warnings as iter 2 remain (shadow* → boxShadow, props.pointerEvents → style.pointerEvents) — no new issues.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning persists across screens: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Reference: /app/frontend/src/theme.ts (shadows.soft/medium)
Console warning persists: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — likely from Modal/Animated.View. Reference: /app/frontend/app/tickets.tsx modal wrappers

action_items: (low, carried over) Migrate theme shadow* props to boxShadow strings for react-native-web.
(low, carried over) Replace remaining props.pointerEvents usages with style.pointerEvents.
(informational) Gallery empty-state was shown because no photos exist yet — visually confirm Save + Share thumb buttons render once a photo is added (main agent can self-test).
critical_code_review_comments: vercel.json duplicates EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in both buildCommand and build.env — safe but redundant; the build.env alone would suffice for Expo to pick it up.
server.py now 1183 lines — still monolithic; consider splitting endpoints into routers (restaurants, tickets, emergency, briefings, chat) as a future refactor.
expo export bundle is 2.7 MB (single entry-<hash>.js). Consider enabling metro tree-shaking / removing unused @expo/vector-icons families to trim size (Vercel/Onrender bandwidth).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vercel deploy target uses build command from /app/frontend/vercel.json which runs 'expo export --platform web --output-dir dist' with EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://portimao-family-backend.onrender.com. That build is confirmed reproducible locally. Emergent preview uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env pointing to the same host as the frontend, which is why all API calls route through /api on the preview domain. Gallery is empty by default; to test Save/Share thumb buttons, add a photo via the Foto picker first.
rca_of_issue: N/A — original Vercel 404 was caused by force-push overwriting the previous vercel.json; new vercel.json restores the Expo web export build. Local reproduction of exactly what Vercel will run succeeded and produced valid dist output.
